2603.20988.title: Can we automatize scientific discovery in the cognitive sciences?
2603.20988.paper_summary: The cognitive sciences aim to understand intelligence by formalizing underlying operations as computational models. Traditionally, this follows a cycle of discovery where researchers develop paradigms, collect data, and test predefined model classes. However, this manual pipeline is fundamentally constrained by the slow pace of human intervention and a search space limited by researchers' background and intuition. Here, we propose a paradigm shift toward a fully automated, in silico science of the mind that implements every stage of the discovery cycle using Large Language Models (LLMs). In this framework, experimental paradigms exploring conceptually meaningful task structures are directly sampled from an LLM. High-fidelity behavioral data are then simulated using foundation models of cognition. The tedious step of handcrafting cognitive models is replaced by LLM-based program synthesis, which performs a high-throughput search over a vast landscape of algorithmic hypotheses. Finally, the discovery loop is closed by optimizing for ''interestingness'', a metric of conceptual yield evaluated by an LLM-critic. By enabling a fast and scalable approach to theory development, this automated loop functions as a high-throughput in-silico discovery engine, surfacing informative experiments and mechanisms for subsequent validation in real human populations.
2603.20988.paper_summary_zh: 認知科學的目標是通過將基本操作形式化為計算模型來理解智能。傳統上，這遵循一個發現循環，研究人員開發範式、收集數據並測試預定義的模型類別。然而，這個手動流程根本上受到人類干預的緩慢步伐和研究人員背景及直覺所限制的搜索空間的約束。在這裡，我們提出一種向完全自動化的心智計算科學的範式轉變，該科學使用大型語言模型（LLMs）實現發現循環的每個階段。在這個框架中，探索概念上有意義的任務結構的實驗範式直接從LLM中抽樣。然後，使用認知的基礎模型模擬高保真度的行為數據。手工製作認知模型的繁瑣步驟被基於LLM的程序合成所取代，該程序在廣闊的算法假設景觀上進行高通量搜索。最後，通過優化“有趣性”來關閉發現循環，這是一種由LLM評估的概念產出指標。通過實現快速且可擴展的理論發展方法，這個自動化循環作為一個高通量的計算發現引擎運作，揭示有意義的實驗和機制，以便在真實人群中進行後續驗證。
2603.20988.author: Akshay K. Jagadish et.al.
2603.20988.authors: Akshay K. Jagadish, Milena Rmus, Kristin Witte, Marvin Mathony, Marcel Binz, Eric Schulz
